scope: Function-level nodes and edges along the wire→script→DB SQLi chain confirmed in docs/security-review/traces/T01-sqli-spine.md

nodes_added.name: tlsReplTool::ReplDollar
nodes_added.summary: Recursive $VAR substitution. Default branch (lines 930-942) does no SQL escaping. Opt-in $['] form at 693-708 + 1035-1038 doubles single apostrophes.

nodes_added.name: tlsSocP::OnReplDollar
nodes_added.summary: Coco/R VM callback. Delegates to tlsReplTool::ReplDollar with mask/object event context.

nodes_added.name: Machine::EvaluateString
nodes_added.summary: If string is wildcard (contains $), calls virtual OnReplDollar. Drives all runtime dollar substitution.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocCONST
nodes_added.summary: Opcode that pushes a string/number constant. For WRITABLE strings, evaluates dollar substitutions before pushing.

nodes_added.name: tlsSql::OnDoFunc Select
nodes_added.summary: Script-dispatched sql->Select(...). Forwards substituted command string verbatim via Select(...,%s,sCmd.c_str()).

nodes_added.name: tlsSql::OnDoFunc Execute
nodes_added.summary: Script-dispatched sql->Execute(...). Forwards substituted command string verbatim via ExecuteF(...,%s,sCmd.c_str()).

nodes_added.name: tlsSql::OnDoFunc Check
nodes_added.summary: Script-dispatched sql->Check(...). Delegates to Select(...,%s,sCmd.c_str()) then checks FoundData().

nodes_added.name: TmsNCLink::CallScript
nodes_added.summary: C++/CLI bridge. MarshalStrings each WCF param verbatim into vsParaVal, then tlsSoc::Exec. No escaping or validation.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::Connect
nodes_added.summary: WCF [OperationContract]. Enqueues imms5Connect.scr with caller-asserted SystemName as the sole parameter. No auth, no validation.

nodes_added.name: tlsUtil::ProcExtSysEvent
nodes_added.summary: TMS_EXTSYSEVENTCALL queue dispatcher. Reads SCRIPTFILENAME and PARAMVAL01..50 from the DB row, calls CallScript with those as the script's main() args.

nodes_added.name: imms5Connect.scr main(sMachineId)
nodes_added.summary: Shipped iMMS5 connect handler. Three SQL sites at lines 32-35, 37-40, 44-46 splice $sMachineId bare into SQL with no escape.

nodes_added.name: pahdEventhandlerApriso2TDM.scr main(...)
nodes_added.summary: AHD customer queue handler invoked by tlsUtil::ProcExtSysEvent (not directly WCF-reachable). Lines 41-46 splice $EXTSYSID/$EXTSYSEVENTID/$EXTSYSEVENTCALLNR bare into SELECT.

edges_added.note: WCF op enqueues into dictMsgIdTplScrParamList; worker thread invokes CallScript with imms5Connect.scr + caller-asserted SystemName.
tlsSoc::Exec(vsParaVal,...) launches the script's main() with WCF params verbatim.
sql->Check("... '$sMachineId' ...") at imms5Connect.scr:32-35. cocCONST evaluates string before dispatch.
WRITABLE string constants are dollar-substituted before push.
OnReplDollar is a pure virtual on Machine; tlsSocP supplies the override that hooks into the tlsObject world.
Sets sValue = csExpression then invokes ReplDollar(...) on the tlsReplTool base.
Calls Select(pmaskEvent, bAddAmpAutomatic, pinterpreterEvent, _T("%s"), sCmd.c_str()) — no escape on the passthrough.
Calls ExecuteF(...,%s,sCmd.c_str()) — no escape on the passthrough.
Check delegates to Select(...,%s,sCmd.c_str()) then verifies FoundData.

notes: All citations re-read in the main context for this trace. F-T01.4 records that pahdEventhandlerApriso2TDM.scr is NOT directly WCF-reachable — the dominant wire-driven SQLi chain is via TdmToolData.Connect → imms5Connect.scr. The opt-in $['] escape syntax was missed by the prior review and is documented here for use in the rewrite's remediation discussion.
